mapper.select: SELECT trade_dt, day_of_week_num, total_cnt, boarding_cnt, alighting_cnt, station_cnt, route_cnt, total_rev, avg_fare, paid_cnt, free_cnt, paid_pct, boarding_pct, revenue_per_transaction, avg_transactions_per_station, avg_transactions_per_route FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt

SELECT trade_dt, hour_range, total_cnt, boarding_cnt, alighting_cnt, hour_usage_pct, total_rev, avg_fare, paid_cnt, free_cnt, paid_pct, boarding_pct, revenue_share_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_HOURLY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt, hour_range

SELECT trade_dt, station_no, total_cnt, boarding_cnt, alighting_cnt, boarding_alighting_diff_pct, net_passenger_flow, avg_fare, total_rev, paid_cnt, free_cnt, boarding_pct, alighting_pct, paid_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_STN_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt, station_no

SELECT trade_dt, route_no, total_cnt, boarding_cnt, alighting_cnt, station_cnt, usage_share_pct, total_rev, avg_fare, paid_cnt, free_cnt, paid_pct, revenue_per_transaction, revenue_share_pct, revenue_per_station, avg_transactions_per_station, boarding_alighting_ratio FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_ROUTE_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt, route_no

SELECT trade_dt, line_no, station_no, station_rank, total_cnt, boarding_cnt, alighting_cnt, total_rev, avg_fare FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_LINE_STN FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt, line_no, station_rank

SELECT trade_dt, boarding_station_no, total_boarding_cnt, usage_share_pct, total_rev, avg_fare, paid_cnt, free_cnt, paid_pct, revenue_per_boarding, revenue_share_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_BRD_STN_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt, boarding_station_no

SELECT trade_dt, card_type, total_cnt, avg_fare, total_rev, paid_cnt, free_cnt, paid_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_CARD_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt, card_type

SELECT trade_dt, day_of_week_num, day_of_week_name, line_no, total_cnt, boarding_cnt, alighting_cnt, total_rev, avg_fare, paid_cnt, free_cnt, paid_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_DAY_LINE FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt, day_of_week_num, line_no

SELECT trade_dt, ticket_type, total_cnt, boarding_cnt, alighting_cnt, total_rev, avg_fare, paid_cnt, free_cnt, paid_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_DATE_TICKET FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt, ticket_type

SELECT trade_dt, hour_range, ticket_type, boarding_cnt, total_rev, avg_fare FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_HOUR_TICKET FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt, hour_range, ticket_type

SELECT day_of_week_num, toInt64(round(avg(total_cnt))) AS avg_total_cnt, toInt64(round(avg(boarding_cnt))) AS avg_boarding_cnt, toInt64(round(avg(total_rev))) AS avg_total_rev, toInt32(round(avg(avg_fare))) AS avg_fare, round(avg(paid_pct), 2) AS avg_paid_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY day_of_week_num ORDER BY day_of_week_num

SELECT hour_range, sum(total_cnt) AS total_cnt, sum(boarding_cnt) AS boarding_cnt, sum(alighting_cnt) AS alighting_cnt, round(avg(hour_usage_pct), 2) AS avg_usage_pct, sum(total_rev) AS total_rev, toInt32(round(avg(avg_fare))) AS avg_fare FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_HOURLY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY hour_range ORDER BY hour_range

SELECT ticket_type, sum(total_cnt) AS total_cnt, sum(boarding_cnt) AS boarding_cnt, sum(total_rev) AS total_rev, toInt32(round(avg(avg_fare))) AS avg_fare, round(avg(paid_pct), 2) AS avg_paid_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_DATE_TICKET FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY ticket_type ORDER BY total_cnt DESC

SELECT card_type, sum(total_cnt) AS total_cnt, sum(total_rev) AS total_rev, toInt32(round(avg(avg_fare))) AS avg_fare, round(avg(paid_pct), 2) AS avg_paid_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_CARD_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY card_type ORDER BY total_cnt DESC

SELECT boarding_station_no, sum(total_boarding_cnt) AS total_boarding_cnt, round(avg(usage_share_pct), 2) AS avg_usage_share_pct, sum(total_rev) AS total_rev, toInt32(round(avg(avg_fare))) AS avg_fare, round(avg(paid_pct), 2) AS avg_paid_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_BRD_STN_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY boarding_station_no ORDER BY total_boarding_cnt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT station_no, sum(boarding_cnt) AS total_boarding_cnt, sum(alighting_cnt) AS total_alighting_cnt, sum(net_passenger_flow) AS net_passenger_flow, round(avg(boarding_alighting_diff_pct), 2) AS avg_diff_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_STN_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY station_no ORDER BY abs(net_passenger_flow) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT route_no, sum(total_cnt) AS total_cnt, sum(total_rev) AS total_rev, round(avg(revenue_per_transaction), 2) AS avg_rev_per_transaction, round(avg(revenue_per_station), 2) AS avg_rev_per_station, round(avg(avg_transactions_per_station), 2) AS avg_trans_per_station, round(avg(boarding_alighting_ratio), 2) AS avg_board_alight_ratio FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_ROUTE_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY route_no ORDER BY total_cnt DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT hour_range, ticket_type, sum(boarding_cnt) AS boarding_cnt, sum(total_rev) AS total_rev, toInt32(round(avg(avg_fare))) AS avg_fare FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_HOUR_TICKET FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY hour_range, ticket_type ORDER BY hour_range, ticket_type

SELECT trade_dt, paid_cnt, free_cnt, round(toFloat64(free_cnt) / toFloat64(paid_cnt + free_cnt) * 100, 2) AS free_pct FROM busan_bigdata.GENTRDT_COMP_DAILY FINAL WHERE trade_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_dt

SELECT count(*) AS total_cnt, countDistinct(TRDTRDT) AS trade_date_cnt, countDistinct(TRDSNO) AS station_cnt, countDistinct(TRDRID) AS route_cnt, countDistinct(TRDCNO) AS card_cnt FROM busan_bigdata.comp_raw WHERE TRDTRDT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
